{{Expand}}

{{Infobox concept
| name = Echo
| introduced = cradle-11-dreadgod
}}

== Dreadgod ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|An echo of [[Yerin]] would be a weak and mute, soulless parody.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c2">''Dreadgod'', chapter 2</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Concepts]]
[[Category:Dreadgod]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle concepts]]
